arts.ttl: PSG Talking Podcast: The Manchester City Preview With The Blue Moon Podcast
arts.sum: Alex Pantling/Getty Images Subscribe to the PSG Talking podcast. The post PSG Talking Podcast: The Manchester City Preview With The Blue Moon Podcast appeared first on PSG Talk.

arts.ttl: Chelsea 3-1 Wolves: Blues score two second-half goals in five minutes to climb above Man City into fourth... as Noni Madueke strikes again after netting hat-trick at Molineux in August
arts.sum: KIERAN GILL AT STAMFORD BRIDGE: At last, victory for Chelsea , and one which was inspired by their own as Trevoh Chalobah made sure Stamford Bridge could finally celebrate.

arts.ttl: Man Utd Seek £30M-Rated Serie A Standout as Alternative After Nuno Mendes Track Hits Dead End
arts.sum: The January transfer window presents Ruben Amorim with his first chance to mold Manchester United in line with his vision. While bigger changes are expected in the summer, reports indicate Amorim has already set his sights on a key player from Paris Saint-Germain. Manuel Ugarte, one of PSG’s summer signings, has thrived under Amorim’s leadership […] The post Man Utd Seek £30M-Rated Serie A Standout as Alternative After Nuno Mendes Track Hits Dead End appeared first on PSG Talk.

arts.ttl: Kevin De Bruyne provides update on Man City contract talks following Erling Haaland's recent renewal
arts.sum: Kevin De Bruyne provides an update on talks over a new Manchester City contract after entering the final six months of his current deal.
Manchester City have confirmed the signing of centre-back Abdukodir Khusanov from Lens, making the 20-year-old their first new arrival of the January transfer window.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa reject £57m bid for Jhon Duran from West Ham - with PSG also keen on Colombia striker
arts.sum: Duran is Villa's top scorer this season with 12 goals though he may again be on the bench for Tuesday's Champions League match in Monaco.
